source: Creator Monetize — Content Ascendancy, Iteration, Market Domination, Magnify Potential

algorithm_framework.name: Content Ascendancy
algorithm_framework.core_metric: User Retention (time) — THE single most important metric
algorithm_framework.formula: Grab Attention + Hold Attention = Mass Reach (Virality)

how_algorithms_work.step_1: Content pushed to small test group (followers or niche-interested users)
how_algorithms_work.step_2: Based on average viewer retention, pushed to more people
how_algorithms_work.step_3: Can reach outside your niche if retention holds
how_algorithms_work.key_insight: This is how no-follower accounts become sensations, and big accounts get no views

algorithm_framework.revenue_model: Platforms make money from ads. They need users (to push ads to) and data (who to push ads to). Creators bring both.
algorithm_framework.misconception: Algorithms do NOT suppress content to force ads. They push content that holds retention.

iteration_protocol.name: Viral Content Iteration Process
rules: Once you start you can't stop
Done EVERY DAY, not every 3rd day
NEVER batch-produce until format is found
iteration_protocol.scientific_method: Purpose → Research → Hypothesis → Experiment → Analysis → Conclusion → Repeat

gsb_iteration.name: Gold Silver Bronze Applied to Iteration
gsb_iteration.starting_phase: Compare YOUR content against Gold/Silver/Bronze in same style/format/topic
gsb_iteration.advanced_phase: Compare YOUR OWN high performers vs low performers
process: Find best videos in your style/format
Compare Gold with Silver and Bronze

market_domination.name: Market Domination Protocol
rules: Have a system so you don't miss posts — hire team
Create schedules and always be ahead
market_domination.double_down: Once you find a style that works, continue 1-2 videos/week in that style. Extract key drivers and replicate. Never repeat content, but use winning elements.

reach_maximizers.name: 6 Reach Maximizers
reach_maximizers.priority_rule: NOTHING is as important as the actual creative. These just enhance it.

maximizers.name: Upload Times
maximizers.method: Check analytics for when viewers are most active. Don't post all at once — 2-3 hour gaps.

maximizers.name: Hashtags
maximizers.method: 3-4 niche-specific only. Do NOT use generic hashtags. SEO optimization primarily.

maximizers.name: Sounds
maximizers.method: Niched sound = targets right viewer. Wrong context = kills retention.

maximizers.name: Story Boosts
maximizers.method: Repost on story (counts as reel views). WARNING: skews analytics.

maximizers.name: Upload at Highest Quality
maximizers.method: Instagram: Media Quality > Upload at highest quality = ON. Check before EVERY post.

content_positioning.core_principle: It's almost never about the content but the CONTEXT in which you deliver it
content_positioning.generalistic_approach: Make anyone interested in your subject while subjectively playing to your core audience
content_positioning.formula: Hook + Hold Attention = Views = Trust = Paying Customer

youtube_content_process.posting_method: Post at 6pm. Let it cook for a day. Track data. Iterate.
youtube_content_process.quantity: 2 videos per week until you find patterns
common_mistakes: Making content you enjoy instead of what market wants
Copying successful style without understanding what made it work

pcm_for_content.name: Process Communication Model — 6 Personality Types
pcm_for_content.purpose: Address all 6 types so everyone feels spoken to. Apply through: speaking, sound, visuals, text, captions.

types.name: Harmonizer
types.language: I feel, I care, happy, sad, I love

types.name: Persister
types.language: I believe, in my opinion, we should

pcm_for_content.common_mistake: Creating content targeting only YOUR 2-3 strongest types, leaving out the rest.
